label: Samsung Semiconductor
tagline: 메모리·파운드리·시스템 반도체를 아우르는 종합 반도체 역량
art_direction: clean geometric tech aesthetic, deep blue (#1428A0) to navy gradient, thin glowing circuit/wafer-pattern lines, minimal line-art icons, no logos, no wordmarks
accent_source: Samsung Blue #1428A0 (Pantone 286C) — cross-checked across brandcolors.net·brandpalettes.com·designpieces.com, with an exact RGB(20,40,160) match on Samsung SDI's official CI page (samsungsdi.com/about-sdi/ci.html)
font_note: Samsung Sharp Sans / SamsungOne (사유 서체, 외부 라이선스 불가) → Pretendard 무료 폴백, 대안 Noto Sans KR
